key_risks: Mean reversion risk if the recent extreme outperformance in South Korea and tech sectors reverses sharply.
Concentration risk in technology and semiconductor-adjacent themes, making the portfolio highly sensitive to shifts in AI sentiment.
Geopolitical or currency risks affecting South Korean equities.

portfolio.rationale: South Korea has shown exceptional recent momentum, with a 19.05% 7-day return and 144.57% 6-month return, likely driven by strong semiconductor exports and AI-related demand.
Software has demonstrated strong recent performance with a 14.56% 7-day return and 24.32% 30-day return, indicating positive sector momentum.
Cybersecurity shows robust short-term momentum with an 11.71% 7-day return and 36.93% 30-day return, supported by strong AI-related spending forecasts.

portfolio_rationale: This portfolio allocates heavily to sectors and regions exhibiting the strongest short-term momentum in the provided trailing returns table, specifically South Korea, Software, and Cybersecurity. The strategy assumes that these extreme short-term trends will persist over the one-week scoring window.
rationale_summary: Allocation prioritizes assets with the highest 7-day and 30-day trailing returns to capture ongoing momentum in the technology and semiconductor-adjacent sectors.
